pipeline_name: Rowboat Creative LLC - Email Evidence Pipeline

metadata.title_subject: Re: Internet and mobile log in

items.summary: Email from Lucas Guariglia (Rowboat Creative) to Haidy Mendoza (53.com) dated January 16, 2020, subject "Re: Internet and mobile log in." Guariglia expresses pleasure at meeting Mendoza, introduces his business partner Joe Zangrilli, and states he is at Chase Bank trying to finalize a close-out process. He indicates an intent to wire funds and will contact Mendoza if there are issues with the direct wire. CC'd recipients include Leonard Mayersky (53.com) and Joe Zangrilli (Rowboat Creative). The email is classified under the BANK_FRAUD_TRANSFERS priority in the evidence pipeline.

items.metadata_summary: 2021 S Corp return (1120S/IL-1120ST), $1.96M gross receipts, $93K ordinary business income
